name: Cheddar Dill Knots
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely shredded sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease cookie sheets.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour mixture with yeast from the foil packet, cheese, and dill; mix well.
3. Stir in 1 cup hot water, butter, 1 tbsp Dijon mustard, and 1 egg until the dough pulls away from the sides of the bowl.
4. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface. With greased or floured hands, shape the dough into a ball.
5. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth, sprinkling with additional flour if necessary to reduce stickiness.
6. Cover the dough with a large bowl; let rest for 5 minutes.
7. Divide the dough into 20 pieces. On a lightly floured surface, roll each piece into an 8-inch rope.
8. Place the rolls 2 to 3 inches apart on the greased cookie sheets.
9. Cover loosely with greased plastic wrap and cloth towel. Let rise in a warm place for 25 minutes or until almost doubled in size.
10. Preheat oven to 375°F.
11. Uncover the dough. In a small bowl, beat all topping ingredients; lightly brush over rolls.
12. Bake for 13 to 18 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm or cool.
